title: Parameterized Access, Authorization, Privacy, and Audit · Integrity Triage
summary: A web service accepts user filters, exposes support data by role, and must resist injection and excessive collection. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a least-privilege parameterized data-access contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evid…
objectives: Identify code-data boundary failures in dynamic SQL and demonstrate why escaping alone is incomplete.
Bind untrusted values through prepared statements while allow-listing unavoidable identifiers or directions.
Design separate identities, roles, grants, views, and row or column controls for minimum required authority.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.sql:
-- sql-basics cumulative relational data portfolio.
-- Each increment declares grain, predicts cardinality or changed rows, runs in fresh browser SQLite,
-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.

SELECT sqlite_version() AS browser_sqlite_version;

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Audit Provenance
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable SQLite increment headed "-- Evidence: sql-audit-provenance-ouqod9" with a concrete grain, hypothesis, or prediction; parameterization, authorization, minimization, or audit evidence; and an observation, reconciliation, or verification tied to returned rows, changed rows, an error, or a plan.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Audit Provenance.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Audit Provenance into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Audit Provenance, keep Audit Provenance connected to executable relational evidence.

content.code:
-- Evidence: sql-audit-provenance-ouqod9
-- grain: declare the exact row or mutation grain before running
SELECT ticket_id, title, status
FROM tickets
WHERE status = :status AND team_id = :authorized_team_id
ORDER BY ticket_id;
-- observation: reconcile the returned rows, changed count, error, or plan with the prediction
